title: rubus arduennensis subsp. collicola
intro: Rubus arduennensis subsp. collicola is a subspecies of the raspberry plant native to Europe, known for its unique properties and benefits. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, digestive problems, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Rubus arduennensis subsp. collicola include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
